parameters.name: funkyUrl
parameters.description: The base URL for Operator to call.

parameters.name: X-Request-ID
parameters.description: Identifier for log tracing. Please use a mixed alphanumeric string in the form of a UUID, with a length of up to 64 characters.

parameters.name: gameCodes[]
parameters.description: The list of game codes to identify games.

parameters.name: trialPlayTimes
parameters.description: Number of granted Trial Play spins.

parameters.name: joinOption
parameters.description:
How players join the Trial Play event.
launch: LaunchGame with eventId, players will automatically claim on first successful launch until it reaches maxMemberCount
bind: Call BindTrialPlayMembers to pre-register players before they can claim on launch.

parameters.name: stakeOption
parameters.description:
How stake is set on CreateTrialPlayEvent.
Fixed: send currency and fixedStake.
Level: send stakeLevel (1, 2, or 3 only). Stake is resolved at claim from game and currency.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: Required when stakeOption is Fixed. Event currency; claim currency on launch must match.

parameters.name: fixedStake
parameters.description: Required when stakeOption is Fixed. On claim, if the game does not support this exact stake, the nearest smaller supported stake is used.

parameters.name: stakeLevel
parameters.description: Required when stakeOption is Level. Tier 1, 2, or 3 only. Call GetSupportedTrialPlayLevels for resolved amounts per game and currency.
